Off Calendar Nov-09-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF THE VEEN FIRM, P.C.'S Motion For Order For Discharge And Award Of Costs And Attorney Fees.
APPEARANCE: Oliver E. Vallejo, Esq. of The Veen Firm, P.C. 673-4800 for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: Moving party provided a valid proof of service, therefore the Court granted the motion. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed in open court. (301/PJB/) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
